name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump is honoring his promise on Syria
body:
Five years ago, ISIS was a powerful, destructive force in the Middle East. By late May 2015, the terrorist group would control half of Syria... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cbfea6cb02&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 19, 2018
---
| | |
# President Trump is honoring his promise on Syria

**Five years ago,** ISIS was a powerful, destructive force in the Middle East. By late May 2015, the terrorist group would control half of Syria—including all of the country’s border crossings with Iraq.

**The American people** were rightly worried. Then-candidate Donald J. Trump made them two solemn promises. The first was that America and its allies would defeat ISIS. The second was that our troops would never be put in harm’s way longer than absolutely necessary to protect the American people.

**In his first days in office** , President Trump changed the rules of engagement, empowering U.S. military commanders on the ground. The results were unmistakable. In August 2017, [_The Washington Post_ reported](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9345be855b&e=3ee4985eea) that gains against ISIS had “dramatically” accelerated on his watch: “Nearly a third of territory reclaimed from the Islamic State in Iraq and Syria since 2014 has been won in the past six months.”

**Eight months later** , in April 2018, President Trump announced that “over the last year, nearly 100 percent of the territory once controlled by the so-called ISIS caliphate in Syria and Iraq has been liberated and eliminated.”

**Today, the President is honoring his promise.** “As other nations step up their contributions, we look forward to the day when we can bring our warriors home,” he said in April. This morning, Press Secretary Sarah Sanders announced that “we have started returning United States troops home as we transition to the next phase of this campaign.”

**The Global Coalition against ISIS will not end.** “The United States and our allies stand ready to re-engage at all levels to defend American interests whenever necessary.”

[Read the statement on Syria from Press Secretary Sanders.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33bd687e95&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Historic prison reform passes in the Senate**

**Nearly all incarcerated Americans** will one day leave prison. President Trump’s goal is to make sure they never return.

**Last night,** in an 87-12 vote, the Senate passed “the most sweeping prison reform bill in years,” as Stephen Dinan of _The Washington Times_ [describes it](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6ccdba9d6&e=3ee4985eea). Once the updated bill is approved by the House—which passed an earlier version of the legislation in May—it will go to President Trump’s desk for his signature.

**The First Step Act** is a landmark bipartisan win for our country. It draws on the success of prison reform efforts in conservative states such as Texas and Georgia, aiming to make our communities safer by making our justice system fairer. More inmates will soon be able to gain job skills, receive drug treatment, and participate in faith-based programs. As a result, they’ll be more likely to return to society as productive citizens rather than repeat criminal offenders.

**“By pushing the FIRST STEP** Act over its final major hurdle, the president has upheld yet another promise to the American people,” writes [Dr. Alveda King](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c71d40969d&e=3ee4985eea), the niece of Martin Luther King, Jr.

[Why President Trump supports historic criminal justice reform](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3cfb3c47b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump holds a roundtable discussion on school safety at the White House** | December 18, 2018
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59596eea6f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6543c111ef&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=23420259cd)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Another Shutdown?
body:
Another Shutdown? No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-jy/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-j/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [Another Shutdown?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-i/)
Is the government really going to shut down in a couple days? And if so who's to blame? And will Social Security checks still go out? And will our soldiers facing hostile forces like the Taliban in Afghanistan still get paid? And if it snows, will my street still get cleared? WHAT'S GOING TO HAPPEN? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Google - One Reason Republicans May Have a Harder Time Getting Their Message Out](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-u/)
We had an interesting hearing in the House Judiciary Committee yesterday. The witness at the hearing was the CEO of GOOGLE - one of the most important companies in the world today. The CEO was Sundar Pichai, not necessarily a household name, but a very important mover and shaker nonetheless on the world scene today. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [The Return of the Queen](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-p/)
For 60 years, the Delta Queen cruised the rivers of America, giving its passengers a unique experience of what it was like to travel America's waterways back in the 1800's. Then 10 years ago, it all came to a halt, and this beautiful queen was chained to a dock in Chattanooga, Tennessee. How did this happen? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [Confrontation at the Border](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-q/)
Thousands of mostly young males from Honduras, Guatemala, and El Salvador, have joined together in caravans and are trying to get into our country through our southern border. Yes, there are some women and children too, and they are inevitably the ones CNN and others interview, and put in their news coverage of unfolding events. But most of the people coming are young, and male, and without accompanying children. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-a/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-z/)
### [Judiciary Committee](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-v/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-s/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-g/)
### [So What Are We Likely to See in The New Congress?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-w/)
Well I'm back in Washington, after a month or so being home in Cincinnati, preparing for, and recovering from, the recent election. Again, thank you for having the confidence in me to represent your best interests in the swamp that is Washington nowadays. I'm girding up for battle in what will most certainly be a very different environment - at least in the House. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-yd/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-yh/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-yk/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-yu/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-jl/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-jr/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[ Tweet ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-jt/)
[ Forward ](http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jtjdkhdd-l-ji)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jtjdkhdd-961825B2-kujkulhluu-jd) | [Unsubscribe](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jtjdkhdd-kujkulhluu-jh/)

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: This is a bold announcement.
body:
| | Peter, Vice President Mike Pence just made a bold announcement on Tuesday. The United States military will be going to space. He put faith at the center of the conversation when he added, “as we embark, we do so with faith.” Of those who go into space, he said, “even there His hand will guide you, His right hand will hold you fast.” I’m proud we have a Vice President who recognizes the role our faith plays in charting the course of our nation. When we take a stand to defend what is important to us, we look beyond what we can see and recognize the spiritual battle we’re in. Without apology, I believe the spiritual side of our lives really does matter. To believe otherwise is, in essence, to define humans as little more than animated protoplasm hopelessly going about our routines for no particular purpose. I prefer to believe that as spiritual beings, there is more to us than flesh and blood. If we do possess a soul capable of living beyond our physical world, then the seeds we plant in this lifetime will yield fruit forever. If you believe those things, the ultimate becomes more important than the immediate. When we decide to live beyond our lifetime, our responsibilities to the next generations goes beyond the horizon of our current jobs. I think you and I are on the same page when it comes to this. When others are trying to push Jesus to the side, we are the ones who must stand and act. **When I look back on 2018 at what God has allowed us to accomplish together, it’s clear to me that you believe in our charted course – our mission – of helping more Christians to Pray, Think, and Vote.** Your donations and prayers made it possible for us to send over 36 million voting reminders with polling information, provide a comprehensive voter guide covering all 70,000 elections across the nation, and reach 325,000 students on Christian University campuses to bring biblical values to the polls! Thank you! Your decision to be involved mobilized millions to take action and make a difference. **All the small decisions we make – to spend additional time with our family, give back to our communities, equip other Christians and the next generation with God’s principles – have the potential to leave a better country to our children and grandchildren.** As we near the end of the year, I hope you will pray about including My Faith Votes in your end-of-year giving plans. When each one of us is doing our part to defend biblical values, united with other Christians across the country, we will have a profound impact not just in 2019 and 2020 but also for generations to come. It’s up to you and me to make the choices, often-small choices, but the ones driven by our faith that will produce the most meaningful and lasting impact. **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181220apl01nd&n=1)
* * *
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181220apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181220apl01nd&n=2) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181220apl01nd&n=3).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: very worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
I've been focused on preventing a government shutdown and passing critical reforms to our criminal justice system, so I admittedly haven't been concentrating as much on fundraising.
My team says that December is looking like our worst fundraising month of the year. This makes me very worried.
The good news is that just $3 from you will go a really long way in helping us make up ground. Will you please donate today, before the holidays? Here's the link:
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/December-2018**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc16c/2a380d31/35ec15b5/f17327/3798499732/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTIyMF9CZWhpbmRfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20181220_Behind_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
We won our 2016 race by just 1,017 votes and New Hampshire is traditionally a top target for Republicans, so you understand that I don't want to leave anything to chance. Thank you for considering.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc16c/2a380d31/35ec15b5/f17320/3798499732/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTIyMF9CZWhpbmRfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20181220_Behind_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc16c/2a380d31/35ec15b5/f17321/3798499732/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Danny Glover
body:
This holiday season you can give a gift that keeps on giving # [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78f1/1579654471/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gift?refcode=email-header")
Friends,
This holiday season you can give a gift that keeps on giving--the gift of Revolution. The movement we are building together will outlast the reindeers and the tinsel. It's a gift the lasts throughout the year.
[**Donate $5 to Our Revolution on behalf of your loved one and we will send you a special message to give them.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78f0/1579654471/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gift?refcode=em181220&noskip=true")
Ultra-wealthy corporations have taken the generosity of the holidays and turned into yet another occasion for exploiting people and turning a profit. Gifting to Our Revolution is an act of defiance against corporate power and a way to recapture our goodwill.
Policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and tuition-free public college are catching fire across the country. Everyday people are blazing new trails as elected officials and community leaders, and yes, people today are Feeling the Bern so much more than they were just a few years ago.
**[Spread the love this year and join me in giving the gift of the Revolution!](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78f0/1579654471/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gift?refcode=em181220&noskip=true")**
In solidarity,
Danny Glover
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78f0/1579654471/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-gift?refcode=em181220&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78f3/1579654471/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78f2/1579654471/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78fd/1579654471/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6ea/bed43eb/88639a1f/75fc78fc/1579654471/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
clean_body: This holiday season you can give a gift that keeps on giving # "" Friends, This holiday season you can give a gift that keeps on giving--the gift of Revolution. The movement we are building together will outlast the reindeers and the tinsel. It's a gift the lasts throughout the year. "" Ultra-wealthy corporations have taken the generosity of the holidays and turned into yet another occasion for exploiting people and turning a profit. Gifting to Our Revolution is an act of defiance against corporate power and a way to recapture our goodwill. Policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and tuition-free public college are catching fire across the country. Everyday people are blazing new trails as elected officials and community leaders, and yes, people today are Feeling the Bern so much more than they were just a few years ago. "" In solidarity, Danny Glover "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Optimism Among US Manufacturers at Record High Heading into 2019
body:
“American manufacturers think the future looks bright,” Joe Williams reports for the Washington Examiner. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3294e2d2d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Optimism Among US Manufacturers at Record High Heading into 2019**

“American manufacturers think the future looks bright,” Joe Williams reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“Nearly 89 percent of the 539 companies polled by the National Association of Manufacturers in the fourth quarter held a positive outlook for their business, bringing the yearly average to 92.4 percent, the highest in the survey’s 20-year history.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1791a17be&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Saturday will mark the one-year anniversary of President Donald J. Trump signing historic tax cuts into law. “Kevin Hassett, chairman of the president’s Council of Economic Advisers, said strong capital spending and economic growth are proof that the good times can be sustained,” Gabriella Muñoz writes in _[The Washington Times.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb6b438d08&e=3ee4985eea)_ “We got exactly the growth affect we predicted last year,” Hassett said.
---
|
---
| “Thankfully, the era of broken promises ended in 2016,” Dr. Alveda King, niece of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., writes in the _[Ledger-Enquirer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ed930c09db&e=3ee4985eea)_. “For Trump, strengthening American communities is fundamental to American success. The FIRST STEP Act does just that by establishing job-training initiatives to better prepare prisoners to re-enter society after they are release.”
---
|
---
| In _USA Today_ , [Secretary of Agriculture Sonny Perdue](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8178c2212a&e=3ee4985eea) writes that the Trump Administration’s new proposed Supplemental Nutritional Assistance Program (SNAP) rules will encourage productivity instead of poverty. “The president has directed me, as Secretary of Agriculture, to propose regulatory reforms to ensure that those who are able to work do so in exchange for their benefits.”
---
|
---
| “During the 2016 campaign, President Trump promised blue-collar and low-wage service sector workers that he would improve their lot. A new labor-market study by a major business group suggests he's kept his word,” the _[Investor’s Business Daily](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c1f06ad13&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “The study by the Conference Board, the New York-based global business organization and think tank, found that blue-collar workers aren't just doing better, they're now in short supply.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=38aec70c12&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78d38f4062&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6b11d50172)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jane Sanders & David Driscoll, The Sanders Institute
subject: The Sanders Institute - Aiming For Something Bigger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
The Sanders Institute recently brought thought leaders from across the country and around the world together
# [](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a695/bed43eb/87cb4317/75fc7a3d/3200575618/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=email-header")
Dear Friend,
As you may know, the Sanders Institute recently brought progressive leaders from across the country and around the world together at The Gathering in Burlington, Vermont. Elected officials, organizers, economists, educators, authors, artists, and emerging leaders discussed some of the most important issues facing our nation and world.
The media covered the depth of topics...
_" The serious topics discussed in detail and with passion were poverty, inequality, human rights, the climate crisis, racism, war, peace, refugees, workers, healthcare, housing, civil rights, independent media, corporate power, criminal justice reform, international solidarity, civil rights, voting rights, the rights of women, the LGBTQ community, immigration, democracy, economics, politics, organizing, and ultimately about how all of these issues can never be adequately understood or addressed in isolation." - Common Dreams_
The broad impact and aspirations...
_" What happens this weekend in Vermont will be more important to the progressive movement over the long term ... The Sanders Institute, built on the momentum of Sanders' iconic, improbable and influential 2016 run, is aiming for something bigger." - The San Francisco Chronicle_
And the fact that we concentrated on how to move our country forward...
_The focus was "more on policy than politicking." - The New York Times_
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through automatically:_
[EXPRESS DONATE: $27](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | [EXPRESS DONATE: $50](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---|---
[EXPRESS DONATE: $100](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | [EXPRESS DONATE: $250](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[EXPRESS DONATE: $500](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | [OTHER AMOUNT](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
While representatives from the national and international progressive community joined us in person, each of the panels at the Gathering was filmed and live-streamed on social media. These videos have already received over 1 million views.
**Now, we plan to edit and expand the content and distribute it widely throughout the country and world. There is a critical need for serious analyses of the major crises we face from a progressive perspective, and we intend to do our best to fill that vacuum.**
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a695/bed43eb/87cb4317/75fc7a3a/3200575618/VEsO/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/resources/documentaries/watch/burlington-vt_-the-sanders-institute-gathering")
Founded on the belief that a vital democracy requires an informed electorate, civil discourse, and bold progressive ideas, the Sanders Institute is committed to expanding the reach of the ideas and solutions discussed and to expanding the global network of progressives. New alliances and collaborative agreements with progressive individuals and organizations are being formed and plans to work together to elevate the voices of progressive people from all walks of life are being made.
**We need your support. Please consider a tax-deductible contribution to the Sanders Institute. Thank you for your consideration.**

[EXPRESS DONATE: $100](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em181220-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
All the best,
David Driscoll & Jane O'Meara Sanders
Sanders Institute Co-Founders
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a695/bed43eb/87cb4317/75fc7a25/3200575618/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em181220")**

name: Team NHGOP
subject: Update: 2019 NHGOP State Committee Annual Meeting
body:
Derek, This serves as an update for**the 2019 Annual Meeting** of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Please point your internet browser to [nh.gop/annual-meeting](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyA8k-2BIZnm58YrBenldRvKkMMMRiXxGvVazW9FwESu7XG_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MsfSugkuws1D6EVKCgn7hR0cbchw0emEQWA9OxuGsYAYnQbOw1hb1bsnzi1ixap5P1c4yJVlV1G0fTljQdHvWHJZDFRY3KGnxs689c8KtyRPv9EjqUNF-2Bb7VLq-2FxgG3nBfdzYSSFmzLz9Ot-2BG9GBrGgOlQnIl9TMiRvDYQfSyBcIcJ-2BSu-2BtDUUv2VzzdWO3Ye-2BiTF8GGGIGr3oUa8vmKI5cixjiMvGTB55pGWyV9-2B-2FnxG-2BGulogaldmZqAFdcfdDi2N5K66OIdF8Oy5FFab24pg-3D-3D) for more information. clean_body: Derek, This serves as an update forthe 2019 Annual Meeting of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Please point your internet browser to for more information. A form to submit bylaw amendments will be live on at 3:00 PM on Friday, December 21st. Submissions will close at 11:59 PM on Monday, December 31st. \- Team NHGOP | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301
